heading: No single option is the answer
columnOne:
85% of you wanted elements from multiple options combined.

Options A and B were your preferred standalone choices, valued for their stability, and the dedicated Club Partner approach.

Option C was not a standalone preference, but one of its elements was consistently requested across every group - taking the administrative, compliance, and coordination burden off clubs and moving it to SLSNZ.
columnTwo:
Option D was decisively rejected. The concern was clear that it would increase volunteer burden, not reduce it.

The emerging hybrid brings together what you valued most from A, B, and C. Option D doesn’t play a part in this direction.
statLabel: Of responses received want a hybrid option
